title: 8 Days Amboseli, Tsavo & Malindi Beach Safari
description: A well-balanced safari combining Amboseli’s elephant herds, Tsavo’s rugged wilderness, and a relaxing coastal escape in Malindi. Ideal for travelers looking for both wildlife adventure and beach relaxation.
highlights: Amboseli National Park – Views of Mount Kilimanjaro & elephants
Tsavo West – Volcanic landscapes & Mzima Springs
Tsavo East – Red elephants & vast wilderness
Malindi Beach – Relaxation and coastal experience

itinerary.title: Arrival to Amboseli
itinerary.description: Arrival and transfer to Amboseli Serena Safari Lodge. Afternoon at leisure or optional game drive.

itinerary.title: Full Day Amboseli
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives in Amboseli National Park with views of Mount Kilimanjaro.

itinerary.title: Amboseli to Tsavo West
itinerary.description: Transfer to Tsavo West and check in at Kilaguni Serena Lodge. Afternoon exploration.

itinerary.title: Tsavo East
itinerary.description: Transfer to Tsavo East and stay at Kudu Camp. Game drive in the park.

itinerary.title: Tsavo to Malindi
itinerary.description: Transfer to Malindi for beach stay.

itinerary.title: Malindi Beach
itinerary.description: Relaxation at beach resort with optional water activities.

included: Accommodation on full board during safari
One way flight on safarilink from Malindi to Nairobi
accommodation: Kilaguni Serena Lodge – Tsavo West (1 night)

travelInfo.clothes: Light safari clothing, hat, sunscreen, and a light jacket for early mornings.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals during safari and resort dining at the beach hotel.

note: Rates are indicative and may vary depending on season and availability.
